name: Potential Leakage of Data via Mailbox Forwarding
notes: This rule triggers when a mailbox is set to forward emails to an external address, which could indicate a potential leakage.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail
when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: External Email Addresses
when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Mail Redirected, Audit.Send Activity Succeeded
TD_list: APPLY Potential Leakage of Data via Mailbox Forwarding on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Mail
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: External Email Addresses
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Application.Mail Redirected, Audit.Send Activity Succeeded
RED_list: Event name: Potential Leakage of Data via Mailbox Forwarding by Another User
Event description: Detects when a mailbox is set to forward emails to a non-corporate email address domain by another user other than the mailbox owner.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Recipients (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
